name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-23
title: Schema extension: add 'retired' status to feature.json schema; teach workspace-map.py --audit to render retired features
description: Currently 'retired' features exist on disk (rabbit-feature-scope, rabbit-spec) but the feature.json schema doesn't formally know about the status field, and workspace-map.py --audit doesn't render them as anything special. Teach the schema (add 'status: enum[active, retired]'), update validate-feature.py to short-circuit on retired, update workspace-map.py to render them with a [RETIRED] tag and skip required-check.
